title: selaginella asprella
intro: Selaginella asprella, also known as the spiny spike moss or spiny spike club moss, is a species of fern that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella asprella include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and lower blood pressure. Selaginella asprella is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion, which can also be used topically to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne.
